project_area: Arts and cultural projects, events, and activities commemorating the 250th anniversary of the United States, including Community/Teaching, Choreography/Dance, Cultural/Traditional Arts, Design, Digital Media/Film, Literary Arts, Music, Theater/Playwriting, and Visual Arts
demographic_requirements: Projects must benefit Middletown residents and align with the celebration of the nation's 250th anniversary.
eligibility_summary: Open to Middletown nonprofits and individuals. Applicants may receive only one grant award per 12-month period. Projects must enrich the lives of Middletown residents through arts and cultural activities.
